name: Blueberry Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Prepare a 9 x 5 x 3-inch pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine sour cream, blueberries, egg whites, and vanilla.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and baking soda.
5. Mix the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients just until moistened.
6. Spread the mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
